summary: Iteration 13 — Strict EU rest-gap validation on /api/cycles/start-new + /api/cycles/confirm-reduced, plus new cap error shape (title/headline/message) on POST /api/entries. Rewrote the 4 legacy tests that called start-new/confirm-reduced without a payload (TestManualRecovery x2 in test_cycle_max_days_cap.py + TestCyclesEndpoints x2 in test_leave_cycle.py) to use the new DetectIn contract. Added /app/backend/tests/test_rest_gap_contract.py with 11 new tests covering 422 on missing body, 400 rest_required with required/actual minute fields, exact-45h and exact-24h boundaries, over-fulfilment with 45h gap on confirm-reduced, the new cap error shape including the exact French wording from the user, and the end-to-end flow cap -> detect-rest -> confirm-reduced -> POST /entries in fresh cycle. Final: 52 PASS / 1 SKIP / 0 FAIL across test_rest_gap_contract.py (11) + test_cycle_max_days_cap.py (12) + test_leave_cycle.py (17, 1 skip) + test_leave_reconciliation.py (13). All 41 prior tests still PASS after rewriting the 4 affected ones.
tests_executed: test_rest_gap_contract.TestCapErrorShape.test_cap_error_includes_title_headline_message (title='Limite du cycle atteinte', headline='6 jours travaillés', exact mandatory-rest text, max_days=6) -> PASS
test_rest_gap_contract.TestEndToEndAfterCap.test_cap_then_detect_rest_then_confirm_reduced_then_post_entry (full E2E flow, fresh cycle days_worked=1, previous marked reduced) -> PASS
test_rest_gap_contract.TestEndToEndAfterCap.test_bogus_future_datetime_legit_when_gap_valid (server accepts since gap is valid) -> PASS
Regression test_cycle_max_days_cap.py (10 other tests) -> ALL PASS
Regression test_leave_cycle.py (15 other tests + 1 SKIP) -> ALL PASS
critical_code_review_comments: _validate_rest_gap helper is correctly shared between start-new (WEEKLY_REST_FULL=2700) and confirm-reduced (WEEKLY_REST_MIN=1440) — single source of truth, well factored.

rest_required HTTPException detail is a structured dict with code/message/required_minutes/actual_minutes — matches spec exactly. For the no-prev-entry branch, required_minutes/actual_minutes are intentionally omitted (no gap can be computed) — this is consistent with the spec wording.

Cap error payload now carries title + headline + message + max_days. The wording is hard-coded in French — fine for the current product scope; consider an i18n catalogue if multi-locale is on the roadmap.
Order of operations in create_entry is preserved: leave-gap detection -> cap check -> cycle creation. The end-to-end test covers the legitimate flow through this ordering.
server.py is now ~900 lines — modularisation (routers + cycle_logic.py) still recommended; flagged since iter 10, no regression but maintainability cost rising.

confirm-reduced unconditionally sets is_reduced_weekly_rest=True even on a 45h+ gap (over-fulfilment). The product spec allows this; UX should make clear to the driver that calling confirm-reduced 'spends' a reduced-rest slot regardless of actual gap length.
Detect-rest endpoint payload (DetectIn) is shared with start-new/confirm-reduced — good reuse. Frontend RestDetectionModal can submit the same payload to all three endpoints without remodeling.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_cycle_max_days_cap.py (rewrote TestManualRecovery 2 tests for new payload contract)
/app/backend/tests/test_leave_cycle.py (rewrote TestCyclesEndpoints 2 tests for new payload contract)

success_rate.backend: 100% — 52/52 PASS, 1 intentional SKIP, 0 FAIL across the 4 relevant suites (11 new + 41 regression).

test_credentials: Each test registers a fresh TEST_restgap_<hex>@example.com / Passw0rd! (or TEST_cap_, TEST_leave_) via /api/auth/register. No shared fixtures.
seed_data_creation: None — per-test fresh user registration; data is isolated by user_id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rest-gap validation contract is fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_rest_gap_contract.py. Invariants verified: (a) DetectIn payload required (422 on missing body), (b) no-prev-entry path returns 400 rest_required without required/actual minute fields, (c) gap-below-threshold returns 400 with both fields populated, (d) exact boundary values (45h for start-new, 24h for confirm-reduced) succeed, (e) confirm-reduced flags previous_cycle.is_reduced_weekly_rest=true regardless of gap length once threshold met, (f) the cap error JSON now carries title/headline/message/max_days with the exact French wording supplied by the user. Cap error wording is asserted via substring matches on message — adjust the asserts if product copy is rephrased.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found; feature implemented and verified per spec.
